# Decisions

Long-lived architecture or workflow decisions for this repository.

## Entry format

```markdown
## YYYY-MM-DD - Decision title

- Context: why the decision was needed
- Decision: what was chosen
- Consequence: trade-offs or follow-up work
- Source: issue, PR, review, or local workflow that produced it
```

## Safety

Do not store secrets, credentials, personal data, private customer data, or temporary one-off notes here.
